title: Robustly Spiced Saudi Arabian Vegetable Pilaf
description: A funky and adventurous Saudi Arabian dish featuring plum sauce and a variety of vegetables, with an al dente finish, perfect for vegetarians. This pilaf is a hearty and flavorful meal option.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the carrots, zucchini, and red bell pepper, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the rice and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Add 2 1/4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is al dente.
Stir in the plum sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
